Let me reconsider the game mechanics. So far:
1. Clicking a gray-bordered swaps white and gray borders
2. Clicking a magenta (first time) moves white to that position and moves the magenta further along the trail
3. Clicking the purple-bordered magenta merges the trails and hides white
4. Clicking the orange-bordered magenta shows white at that position
But now clicking the orange-bordered magenta at (11,41) didn't work. Maybe I can only click each magenta once? Or maybe I need to click the border instead of the center?
Let me think about what I should try next. The white-bordered is at (13,42) with 6 pixels. The orange-bordered magenta is at (11,41). The purple-bordered magenta is at (41,49).
Maybe I should try clicking the purple-bordered magenta at (41,49) again? Or maybe I should try clicking one of the gray-bordered objects?
Actually, let me step back and think about the goal. In Level 1, the goal was to get white to the ring. In Level 2, maybe the goal is different.

- White-bordered at (13,42) with 6 pixels (smaller than normal 12 pixels)

- Purple-bordered magenta at (41,49)
- Gray-bordered at (9,49), (11,34), (35,45), (48,54)
